
# ScriptHuman

ScriptHuman is an AI text humanization platform that rewrites AI-generated content to bypass AI detectors and restore natural human flow.

## Core Features
1. **The Writing Room**: Main humanization engine with "Humanity Pulse" visualization.
2. **Style Studio**: Customize tone (Professional, Casual, Academic) and vocabulary level.
3. **Trust Hub**: Verify content authenticity, generate certificates, and analyze "vibe" metrics.
4. **Enterprise Hub**: Bulk processing and API access for high-volume needs.

## API Access
Developers can integrate ScriptHuman via our REST API.
- Documentation: https://scripthuman.ai/documentation
- Base URL: https://scripthuman.ai/api

## Usage
Paste AI text into the editor on the homepage or Writing Room, select a mode (Standard, Fluency, Creative), and click "Humanize".

## Contact
Support: support@scripthuman.ai
Twitter: @ScriptHumanAI
